originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&flags` is never used.

presenceCondition: (and (= CROSS_COMPILE true) (= WIN32 true) (= NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES true))
model:
(define-fun WIN32 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CROSS_COMPILE () Bool
  true)
reasoning: PC is infeasible: CROSS_COMPILE=T causes the '#ifdef CROSS_COMPILE' branch at L6-7 to execute, skipping the '#else' block (L8-13) where NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES could be defined via WIN32/OS2. With CROSS_COMPILE=T, NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES is never defined internally, yet PC requires NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES=T — contradiction. Configuration cannot exist. Classification: FALSE.
